name: Cloudflare Workers

naming.description: Standard POSIX. Bindings (KV, D1, R2) use separate namespace from env vars.

limits.notes: Individual values ≤ 5 KB. Total script size (including vars) ≤ 128 KB for free tier, 10 MB for paid. Secrets are encrypted at rest.

notes: Workers distinguish between 'vars' (plaintext, visible in dashboard) and 'secrets' (encrypted, write-only). Configure in wrangler.toml [vars] block or via 'wrangler secret put'.
